fpsflow.name: FPSFlow
fpsflow.config.title: FPSFlow Configuration
fpsflow.config.profile.tooltip: Select a preset that adjusts all settings automatically.
fpsflow.config.entity_culling.enabled.to: Skip rendering entities that are not visible to the player.
Use raycasting to detect entities hidden behind solid blocks.
fpsflow.config.entity_culling.async_occl: Spread occlusion raycasts across multiple ticks to prevent frame spikes.
fpsflow.config.entity_culling.max_distan: Entities beyond this distance (in blocks) are never rendered.
fpsflow.config.entity_culling.cache_inte: How many ticks between occlusion re-checks per entity. Higher = faster but less accurate.
fpsflow.config.entity_culling.entity_typ: Map of entity type IDs to culling override. false = never cull this type.
fpsflow.config.block_entity_culling.enab: Skip rendering distant block entities such as chests, furnaces, signs, and banners.
fpsflow.config.block_entity_culling.max_: Block entities beyond this distance (in blocks) are not rendered.
fpsflow.config.particle.enabled.tooltip: Prevent new particles from spawning when limits are reached.
fpsflow.config.particle.max_particles.to: No new particles are spawned once this count is reached.
fpsflow.config.particle.max_distance.too: Particles spawning further than this distance (in blocks) from the player are skipped.
fpsflow.config.gui.enabled.tooltip: Reduce unnecessary HUD draw calls and re-renders.
fpsflow.config.gui.hotbar_caching.toolti: Track item changes per hotbar slot to skip redundant icon processing.
fpsflow.config.gui.hud_throttling.toolti: Limit non-critical HUD updates to every other tick.
fpsflow.config.render_cache.enabled.tool: Cache computed rendering data to avoid redundant calculations per frame.
fpsflow.config.world_join_optimizer.enab: Tighten culling distances for a few seconds after joining a world to reduce the initial FPS spike.
fpsflow.config.world_join_optimizer.grac: How many ticks after joining before culling distances return to normal. 200 = 10 seconds.
fpsflow.config.update_checker.enabled.to: Check Modrinth for new FPSFlow versions on startup.
fpsflow.update.available: A new version of FPSFlow is available: %s → %s (check Modrinth)
fpsflow.compat.entity_culling_detected: EntityCulling mod detected – FPSFlow entity culling disabled to avoid conflicts.
fpsflow.compat.immediately_fast_detected: ImmediatelyFast detected – FPSFlow HUD caching deferred.
fpsflow.compat.sodium_detected: Sodium detected – FPSFlow adds entity/GUI optimizations on top.
